data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of transferring bookings between locations, but the evidence provided does not include any specific tests or confirmations regarding this functionality. While the linked use case describes the scenario, there are no concrete traces or snapshots demonstrating that the booking transfer process was executed or validated. This lack of direct evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement being tested.
gaps: No evidence confirming the execution or validation of booking transfers between locations.
